ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Team logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team colors */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Instagram handle */,
  "facebook_handle" TEXT /* Facebook handle */,
  "nickname" TEXT /* Nickname or alias */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points allowed */,
  "srs" REAL /* Simple Rating System (SRS) */,
  "sos" REAL /* Strength of Schedule (SOS) */,
  "conference_standings" TEXT /* Conference standings */,
  "tournament_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of tournament appearances */,
  "conference_championships" INTEGER /* Number of conference championships */,
  "playoff_record" TEXT /* Playoff record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "year_of_birth" TEXT /* Year of birth */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  "previous_experience" TEXT /* Previous college or professional experience */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards or honors received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player efficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., regular season, tournament, playoff) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., final, overtime) */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "attendance_capacity" INTEGER /* Attendance capacity of the venue */,
  "game_officials" TEXT /* Game officials (e.g., referees, umpires) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., shot, rebound, foul) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, administrator) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
column_names: High school attended by the player
Awards or honors received by the player
Unique identifier for each stat entry
Type of the game (e.g., regular season, tournament, playoff)
Status of the game (e.g., final, overtime)
Venue where the game was played
Unique identifier for each log entry
Type of the event (e.g., shot, rebound, foul)
Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, administrator)
ID of the team associated with the user
